---
title: "🪐 Space Corner"
toc: false
resources:
  - starship.jpg
  - artemis.jpg
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ============================================================
   Space Corner — Styles
   ============================================================ */

/* --- Hero / Countdown ---------------------------------------- */
.space-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #060614 0%, #0d1b3e 45%, #0a0a1f 100%);
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  padding: 3rem 2rem 2.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  color: white;
}

/* Starfield: three layers of dots at different densities */
.space-hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.85) 1px, transparent 1px),
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.55) 1px, transparent 1px),
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.30) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 350px 350px, 180px 180px, 120px 120px;
  background-position: 0 0, 90px 40px, 170px 120px;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-prefix {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.hero-mission {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.hero-vehicle {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.hero-status-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.8rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

/* Countdown timer */
.countdown-timer {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;       /* explicit — overrides Bootstrap's default wrap */
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: clamp(0.2rem, 1.5vw, 0.5rem);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.countdown-unit {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex: 1;           /* equal share of available width */
  min-width: 0;      /* allow shrinking below content size */
}

.count-num {
  /* Scales smoothly: 1.6rem on a 320px phone → 3.2rem on desktop */
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 8vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #fff;
  text-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(120, 200, 255, 0.6);
}

.count-label {
  font-size: clamp(0.5rem, 1.8vw, 0.65rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
}

.countdown-sep {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 8vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  line-height: 1;
  padding-top: 0;
  align-self: flex-start;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.hero-date-line {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.hero-webcast-link {
  color: rgba(120, 200, 255, 0.9);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.hero-webcast-link:hover { color: #fff; text-decoration: underline; }

/* --- Section titles ------------------------------------------ */
.sc-section-title {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

/* --- Featured cards (Starship / Artemis) --------------------- */
.featured-card {
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}

.featured-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}

.featured-card.starship { border-color: #e8620a; }
.featured-card.artemis  { border-color: #1a6fff; }

.featured-card .fc-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.featured-card.starship .fc-header {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(232,98,10,0.12), transparent);
  color: #e8620a;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(232,98,10,0.2);
}

.featured-card.artemis .fc-header {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(26,111,255,0.12), transparent);
  color: #1a6fff;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,111,255,0.2);
}

.featured-card .fc-body {
  padding: 1rem;
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.fc-thumb {
  width: 96px;
  height: 96px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.fc-thumb-placeholder {
  width: 96px;
  height: 96px;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 2.6rem;
  background: rgba(128,128,128,0.08);
}

.fc-title {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.fc-meta {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}

.fc-desc {
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.fc-desc-short {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.fc-desc-full { display: none; }
.fc-desc.expanded .fc-desc-short { display: none; }
.fc-desc.expanded .fc-desc-full  { display: block; }

.fc-expand-toggle {
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  padding: 0;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.fc-expand-toggle:hover { color: var(--bs-body-color); }

.fc-info-link {
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.fc-info-link:hover { color: var(--bs-body-color); }

.fc-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}

/* --- Status badges ------------------------------------------- */
.sc-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.2rem;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  border: 1px solid;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sc-badge.go      { border-color: #28a745; background: rgba(40,167,69,0.1);   color: #1e7e34; }
.sc-badge.tbd     { border-color: #ffc107; background: rgba(255,193,7,0.1);   color: #856404; }
.sc-badge.hold    { border-color: #ff6b00; background: rgba(255,107,0,0.1);   color: #7f3500; }
.sc-badge.default { border-color: #6c757d; background: rgba(108,117,125,0.1); color: #495057; }

[data-bs-theme="dark"] .sc-badge.go      { color: #7dda9a; background: rgba(40,167,69,0.15);   }
[data-bs-theme="dark"] .sc-badge.tbd     { color: #ffd454; background: rgba(255,193,7,0.15);   }
[data-bs-theme="dark"] .sc-badge.hold    { color: #ffaa55; background: rgba(255,107,0,0.15);   }
[data-bs-theme="dark"] .sc-badge.default { color: #adb5bd; background: rgba(108,117,125,0.15); }

/* --- Net date ------------------------------------------------- */
.net-date         { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; }
.net-imprecise    { opacity: 0.7; font-style: italic; }

/* --- Webcast button ------------------------------------------ */
.webcast-btn {
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 0.3rem;
  border: 1px solid currentColor;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  color: #e74c3c;
  transition: opacity 0.15s;
}
.webcast-btn:hover { opacity: 0.75; color: #e74c3c; }

/* --- All-launches rows --------------------------------------- */
.launch-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.7rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  gap: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  transition: background-color 0.12s;
}
.launch-row:hover { background: var(--bs-tertiary-bg); }

.lr-date {
  min-width: 62px;
  text-align: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.lr-date-month { font-size: 0.65rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--bs-secondary-color); }
.lr-date-day   { font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; }
.lr-date-year  { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--bs-secondary-color); }

.lr-info       { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.lr-name       { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.93rem; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.lr-sub        { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--bs-secondary-color); }

.lr-right      { flex-shrink: 0; text-align: right; }

/* --- Show-more button ---------------------------------------- */
.sc-show-more {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  border: 1px dashed var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s;
}
.sc-show-more:hover {
  background: var(--bs-tertiary-bg);
  color: var(--bs-body-color);
}

/* --- Loading / error states ---------------------------------- */
.sc-loading { text-align: center; padding: 3rem; color: var(--bs-secondary-color); }
.sc-error   {
  padding: 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(207,68,70,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(207,68,70,0.25);
}

/* --- Responsive tweaks --------------------------------------- */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  /* Shrink hero padding so the countdown timer has more horizontal room */
  .space-hero { padding: 2rem 1rem 1.75rem; }
  /* count-num scales via clamp() — no font-size override needed */
  .hero-mission   { font-size: 1.4rem; }
  .countdown-timer { gap: 0.15rem; }
  .fc-thumb, .fc-thumb-placeholder { display: none; }
  .lr-date        { min-width: 50px; }
}
</style>

<!-- =========================================================
     HERO: Countdown
     ========================================================= -->
<div class="space-hero">
  <div id="hero-loading" class="hero-prefix">Loading launch data… 🛰️</div>

  <div id="hero-content" style="display:none">
    <div class="hero-prefix"  id="hero-prefix">Next Featured Launch</div>
    <div class="hero-mission" id="hero-mission">—</div>
    <div class="hero-vehicle" id="hero-vehicle"></div>
    <div id="hero-status-wrap"></div>

    <div class="countdown-timer" id="countdown-timer">
      <div class="countdown-unit">
        <span class="count-num" id="cd-days">--</span>
        <span class="count-label">Days</span>
      </div>
      <span class="countdown-sep">:</span>
      <div class="countdown-unit">
        <span class="count-num" id="cd-hours">--</span>
        <span class="count-label">Hours</span>
      </div>
      <span class="countdown-sep">:</span>
      <div class="countdown-unit">
        <span class="count-num" id="cd-mins">--</span>
        <span class="count-label">Mins</span>
      </div>
      <span class="countdown-sep">:</span>
      <div class="countdown-unit">
        <span class="count-num" id="cd-secs">--</span>
        <span class="count-label">Secs</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-date-line" id="hero-date"></div>
    <div id="hero-webcast"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="hero-error" style="display:none" class="hero-prefix">
    ⚠️ Could not load launch data
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =========================================================
     LAUNCHES LIST
     ========================================================= -->
<div id="featured-section" style="display:none">
  <div class="sc-section-title">Starship &amp; Artemis</div>
  <div id="featured-launches"></div>
</div>

<div id="all-section">
  <div class="sc-section-title">🚀 All Upcoming Launches</div>
  <div id="all-launches">
    <div class="sc-loading">Loading… 🛰️</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="text-muted mt-3" style="font-size:0.72rem; text-align:right;">
  Data from <a href="https://thespacedevs.com/llapi" target="_blank">Launch Library 2</a> ·
  Updates every 30 min ·
  <span id="data-age"></span>
</div>

<script>
/* ============================================================
   Space Corner — Data & Rendering
   ============================================================ */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  const CACHE_KEY = 'sc_launches_v2';
  const CACHE_TTL = 30 * 60 * 1000; // 30 minutes
  const API_URL   = 'https://ll.thespacedevs.com/2.2.0/launch/upcoming/?limit=50&format=json';

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Helpers
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  /** Escape HTML special characters to prevent XSS from API data */
  function esc(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    return str.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }

  /** Identify Starship / Artemis launches by name, rocket, or program tag */
  function getProgram(launch) {
    const check = (...strs) => strs.some(s => (s || '').toLowerCase().includes('starship'));
    const progs = (launch.programs || []).map(p => p.name || '');

    if (
      check(launch.name, launch.rocket?.configuration?.name, launch.rocket?.configuration?.family, ...progs)
    ) return 'starship';

    const checkA = (...strs) => strs.some(s => (s || '').toLowerCase().includes('artemis'));
    if (checkA(launch.name, launch.mission?.name, ...progs)) return 'artemis';

    return null;
  }

  function statusClass(status) {
    const a = (status?.abbrev || '').toLowerCase();
    if (a === 'go')               return 'go';
    if (a === 'tbd' || a === 'tbc') return 'tbd';
    if (a === 'hold')             return 'hold';
    return 'default';
  }

  function isPrecise(launch) {
    const p = launch.net_precision?.name || 'Hour';
    return p === 'Hour' || p === 'Minute' || p === 'Day';
  }

  function formatNET(launch) {
    const d = new Date(launch.net);
    const p = launch.net_precision?.name || 'Hour';
    const base = d.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { timeZone:'UTC', day:'numeric', month:'short', year:'numeric' });
    if (p === 'Hour' || p === 'Minute') {
      const t = d.toLocaleTimeString('en-AU', { timeZone:'UTC', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' });
      return `${base} at ${t} UTC`;
    }
    if (p === 'Day')     return base;
    if (p === 'Week')    return `~week of ${base}`;
    if (p === 'Month')   return d.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { timeZone:'UTC', month:'long', year:'numeric' });
    if (p === 'Quarter') {
      const q = Math.ceil((d.getUTCMonth() + 1) / 3);
      return `~Q${q} ${d.getUTCFullYear()}`;
    }
    return `~${d.getUTCFullYear()}`;
  }

  function badge(status) {
    const c = statusClass(status);
    const dot = c === 'go' ? '●' : c === 'tbd' ? '◌' : '◐';
    return `<span class="sc-badge ${c}">${dot} ${esc(status?.name || 'Unknown')}</span>`;
  }

  function webcastBtn(launch) {
    const v = launch.vidURLs?.[0];
    if (!v) return '';
    return `<a href="${esc(v.url)}" target="_blank" class="webcast-btn">▶ Webcast</a>`;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Renderers
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  function renderFeaturedCard(launch) {
    const prog  = getProgram(launch);
    const thumb = launch.image?.thumbnail_url || launch.image?.image_url || null;
    const fallbackImg = prog === 'starship' ? 'starship.jpg' : 'artemis.jpg';
    const label = prog === 'starship' ? 'SpaceX Starship' : 'NASA Artemis';
    const desc  = launch.mission?.description || '';
    const isTruncated = desc.length > 190;
    const slug  = launch.slug || '';
    const rocket   = launch.rocket?.configuration?.full_name || launch.rocket?.configuration?.name || '';
    const pad      = launch.pad?.name || '';
    const location = launch.pad?.location?.name || '';

    const thumbHtml = thumb
      ? `<img src="${esc(thumb)}" class="fc-thumb" alt="" data-fallback-img="${fallbackImg}">`
      : `<img src="${fallbackImg}" class="fc-thumb" alt="">`;

    return `
      <div class="featured-card ${prog} card">
        <div class="fc-header">
          ${label}&nbsp; &middot; &nbsp;${badge(launch.status)}
        </div>
        <div class="fc-body">
          ${thumbHtml}
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div class="fc-title">${esc(launch.name)}</div>
            <div class="fc-meta">
              ${rocket   ? `<span>🛸 ${esc(rocket)}</span>` : ''}
              ${pad      ? `<span>📍 ${esc(pad)}${location ? ', ' + esc(location) : ''}</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            ${desc ? `
              <div class="fc-desc">
                <div class="fc-desc-short">${esc(desc)}</div>
                ${isTruncated ? `<div class="fc-desc-full">${esc(desc)}</div>` : ''}
              </div>
            ` : ''}
            <div class="fc-footer">
              <span class="net-date ${isPrecise(launch) ? '' : 'net-imprecise'}">
                📅 ${formatNET(launch)}
              </span>
              ${isTruncated ? `<button class="fc-expand-toggle" data-action="expand">▾ More</button>` : ''}
              ${slug ? `<a href="https://spacelaunchnow.me/launch/${esc(slug)}" target="_blank" class="fc-info-link">More info ↗</a>` : ''}
              ${webcastBtn(launch)}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  function renderLaunchRow(launch) {
    const d     = new Date(launch.net);
    const prog  = getProgram(launch);
    const prec  = isPrecise(launch);
    const month = d.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { timeZone:'UTC', month:'short' }).toUpperCase();
    const day   = d.toLocaleDateString('en-AU', { timeZone:'UTC', day:'numeric' });
    const year  = d.getUTCFullYear();
    const rocket   = launch.rocket?.configuration?.name || '—';
    const provider = launch.launch_service_provider?.abbrev || launch.launch_service_provider?.name || '';
    const loc      = launch.pad?.location?.name || '';
    const icon     = prog === 'starship' ? ' 🚀' : prog === 'artemis' ? ' 🌙' : '';

    return `
      <div class="launch-row">
        <div class="lr-date ${prec ? '' : 'net-imprecise'}">
          <div class="lr-date-month">${prec ? month : '~'}</div>
          <div class="lr-date-day"  >${prec ? day   : '?'}</div>
          <div class="lr-date-year" >${year}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="lr-info">
          <div class="lr-name">${esc(launch.name)}${icon}</div>
          <div class="lr-sub">${esc(rocket)}${provider ? ' · ' + esc(provider) : ''}${loc ? ' · ' + esc(loc) : ''}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="lr-right">
          ${badge(launch.status)}
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Countdown timer
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  let _timerID = null;

  function startCountdown(target) {
    if (_timerID) clearInterval(_timerID);
    const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2, '0');

    function tick() {
      const diff = target - Date.now();
      if (diff <= 0) {
        ['cd-days','cd-hours','cd-mins','cd-secs'].forEach(id => {
          document.getElementById(id).textContent = '00';
        });
        document.getElementById('hero-prefix').textContent = '🚀 T-0 — Launch!';
        clearInterval(_timerID);
        // Refresh after 5 seconds to show the next upcoming launch
        setTimeout(() => {
          localStorage.removeItem(CACHE_KEY);
          load();
        }, 5000);
        return;
      }
      const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
      document.getElementById('cd-days') .textContent = days;
      document.getElementById('cd-hours').textContent = pad(Math.floor((diff % 86400000) / 3600000));
      document.getElementById('cd-mins') .textContent = pad(Math.floor((diff % 3600000)  / 60000));
      document.getElementById('cd-secs') .textContent = pad(Math.floor((diff % 60000)    / 1000));
    }
    tick();
    _timerID = setInterval(tick, 1000);
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Hero render
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  function renderHero(launches) {
    const future = launches.filter(l =>
      new Date(l.net).getTime() > Date.now() &&
      (l.status?.abbrev || '').toLowerCase() !== 'success'
    );

    // Priority: featured + precise → featured → any
    const hero =
      future.find(l => getProgram(l) && isPrecise(l)) ||
      future.find(l => getProgram(l)) ||
      future[0];

    if (!hero) {
      document.getElementById('hero-loading').textContent = 'No upcoming launches found.';
      return;
    }

    document.getElementById('hero-loading').style.display  = 'none';
    document.getElementById('hero-content').style.display  = 'block';

    const prog = getProgram(hero);
    document.getElementById('hero-prefix').textContent =
      prog === 'starship' ? '🚀 Next Starship Launch' :
      prog === 'artemis'  ? '🌙 Next Artemis Launch'  :
                            '🚀 Next Launch';

    document.getElementById('hero-mission').textContent = hero.name;

    const vehicle = hero.rocket?.configuration?.full_name || hero.rocket?.configuration?.name || '';
    const pad     = hero.pad?.name || '';
    document.getElementById('hero-vehicle').textContent = [vehicle, pad].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');

    // Status
    const sc = statusClass(hero.status);
    const colours = { go:'#28a745', tbd:'#ffc107', hold:'#ff6b00', default:'#6c757d' };
    const col = colours[sc];
    document.getElementById('hero-status-wrap').innerHTML =
      `<span class="hero-status-badge"
             style="background:${col}22;border:1px solid ${col};color:${col}">
         ${esc(hero.status?.name || 'Unknown')}
       </span>`;

    // Timer or date only
    if (isPrecise(hero)) {
      startCountdown(new Date(hero.net).getTime());
      document.getElementById('countdown-timer').style.display = 'flex';
      document.getElementById('hero-date').textContent = 'NET: ' + formatNET(hero);
    } else {
      document.getElementById('countdown-timer').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('hero-date').textContent = 'Estimated: ' + formatNET(hero);
    }

    // Webcast
    const vid = hero.vidURLs?.[0];
    document.getElementById('hero-webcast').innerHTML = vid
      ? `<a href="${esc(vid.url)}" target="_blank" class="hero-webcast-link">▶ Watch Webcast</a>`
      : '';
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Launch list render
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  function renderLaunches(launches) {
    const pending  = launches.filter(l => (l.status?.abbrev || '').toLowerCase() !== 'success');
    const featured = pending.filter(l => getProgram(l));
    const rest     = pending.filter(l => !getProgram(l));

    if (featured.length) {
      document.getElementById('featured-section').style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('featured-launches').innerHTML =
        featured.map(renderFeaturedCard).join('');
    }

    const VISIBLE_COUNT = 10;
    const allEl = document.getElementById('all-launches');
    if (!rest.length && !featured.length) {
      allEl.innerHTML = '<div class="sc-loading">No upcoming launches found.</div>';
    } else {
      const rows = rest.map((l, i) => {
        const html = renderLaunchRow(l);
        return i < VISIBLE_COUNT ? html : html.replace('class="launch-row"', 'class="launch-row lr-hidden" style="display:none"');
      });
      allEl.innerHTML = rows.join('');

      const hidden = rest.length - VISIBLE_COUNT;
      if (hidden > 0) {
        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.className = 'sc-show-more';
        btn.textContent = `Show ${hidden} more launches`;
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          allEl.querySelectorAll('.lr-hidden').forEach(el => {
            el.style.display = '';
            el.classList.remove('lr-hidden');
          });
          btn.remove();
        });
        allEl.appendChild(btn);
      }
    }
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Error state
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  function showError(msg) {
    document.getElementById('hero-loading').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('hero-error').style.display  = 'block';
    document.getElementById('hero-error').textContent    = '⚠️ ' + msg;
    document.getElementById('all-launches').innerHTML    = `
      <div class="sc-error">
        <strong>Could not load launch data.</strong><br>
        ${msg}<br>
        <small class="text-muted">
          Data from <a href="https://thespacedevs.com/llapi" target="_blank">Launch Library 2</a>.
          Try refreshing in a few minutes.
        </small>
      </div>`;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------------------------
  // Fetch (with localStorage cache)
  // ----------------------------------------------------------

  async function load() {
    // Try cache first
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY);
      if (raw) {
        const { data, ts } = JSON.parse(raw);
        if (Date.now() - ts < CACHE_TTL) {
          const age = Math.round((Date.now() - ts) / 60000);
          document.getElementById('data-age').textContent = `Cached ${age}m ago`;
          renderHero(data);
          renderLaunches(data);
          return;
        }
      }
    } catch (_) { /* ignore stale/corrupt cache */ }

    // Live fetch
    try {
      const res  = await fetch(API_URL);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
      const json = await res.json();
      const data = json.results || [];

      try {
        localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ data, ts: Date.now() }));
      } catch (_) { /* storage quota exceeded — fine */ }

      document.getElementById('data-age').textContent = 'Just updated';
      renderHero(data);
      renderLaunches(data);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('[Space Corner]', err);
      showError(err.message);
    }
  }

  // Toggle expanded/collapsed description on featured cards
  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    const btn = e.target.closest('.fc-expand-toggle');
    if (!btn) return;
    const desc = btn.closest('.featured-card').querySelector('.fc-desc');
    if (!desc) return;
    const expanding = !desc.classList.contains('expanded');
    desc.classList.toggle('expanded');
    btn.textContent = expanding ? '▴ Less' : '▾ More';
  });

  // Replace broken thumbnail images with local fallback
  document.addEventListener('error', function (e) {
    if (e.target.tagName === 'IMG' && e.target.classList.contains('fc-thumb')) {
      const fallback = e.target.dataset.fallbackImg;
      if (fallback) {
        e.target.removeAttribute('data-fallback-img');
        e.target.src = fallback;
      }
    }
  }, true);

  load();
})();
</script>
```
